MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALARZA, HECTOR HEARING SET FOR MAR-08-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $886.35 FILED BY GALARZA, HECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ILAIDA PACIFIC BELL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-27-1999 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALARZA, HECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ILAIDA $886.35 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $906.35, JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF PACIFIC BELL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALARZA, HECTOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ILAIDA PACIFIC BELL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-24-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-14-2000 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-08-2000, GRANTED
